finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_17.md:175; chapters/chapter_17.md:177; chapters/chapter_17.md:181; chapters/chapter_17.md:189; chapters/chapter_17.md:193; chapters/chapter_17.md:197; chapters/chapter_17.md:203; chapters/chapter_17.md:207; chapters/chapter_17.md:211; chapters/chapter_17.md:215; chapters/chapter_17.md:217; chapters/chapter_17.md:231
finding_results.notes: Replaced Harry's three-turn stacked thesis sequence (thesis line + plan-diagnosis + control-aphorism) with rougher back-and-forth where Hermione actively deflects to the intellectual frame (line 175: 'The research required proximity'), argues the timing distinction (line 197: 'That's not the same thing'), and defends her methodology (line 215: 'I was trying to be sure') before Harry's point lands. Harry's insight now arrives through short interruptions and blunt guesses ('When you were ready,' 'He found out before you had it sorted. That's the part.') rather than polished monologues. His longest turn (line 211) is broken by a physical gesture and arrives in fragments. Removed the quotable aphorism ('hiding with better stationery'), the narrator-certifying line ('That landed harder than anything else'), the narrator tone-certification ('No softness, no performance, just fact'), and the post-conversation narrator admiration ('Harry's words did not need further analysis. They only needed somewhere to land.'). The core pivot ('Then don't go back for the research,' line 247) and Hermione's self-reckoning (line 243) are preserved.

summary: Reworked the central Harry-Hermione exchange (lines 155-249) to break Harry's sequential polished thesis-speeches into rougher, shorter back-and-forth. Hermione now actively resists, deflects to research, argues timing, and defends her methodology before the insight lands. No single Harry turn functions as a finished psychological summary. Removed narrator lines that certified the dialogue's impact. The scene's dramatic function, leverage shift, and core pivot are preserved.
